description_long: This sculpture depicts a fantastical creature with the body and wings of a bird and the head of a feline, rendered in a metallic bronze finish. The wings are outstretched and textured with pronounced ridges, giving a sense of movement and grandeur. The feline head is open-mouthed, with defined facial features and a strong neck, while the chest and torso are muscular and stylized. The back of the sculpture is rounded and smooth, contrasting with the detailed wings and head. The overall form is dynamic and imposing, suggesting a mythological or guardian-like presence. The surface is highly reflective, with a polished, glossy appearance.
description: A bronze-colored sculpture of a winged, feline-headed creature with outstretched, textured wings and a muscular torso, finished in a glossy metallic sheen.
description_view_0: Side view showing the feline head in profile, one wing fully visible with detailed ridges, and the muscular chest and torso.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the open-mouthed feline head, symmetrical outstretched wings, and the central chest area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the other wing and side of the feline head visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded back and both wings extending outward, with minimal detail on the head.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background and setting are not shown in the images.
